title: Support Worker
description:
Creative Support is looking for a motivated Support Worker to join our team in Sheffield.

- Provide person-centred care and support
- Assist with daily living tasks
- Promote independence and wellbeing

You will work closely with service users to ensure high-quality support.

Benefits:
- Ongoing training
- Career progression opportunities

title: Care Assistant
description:
As a Care Assistant, you will provide essential support to residents.

- Assist with personal care
- Support mobility and nutrition
- Maintain dignity and respect

Benefits:
- Paid training
- Flexible shifts

title: Healthcare Assistant
description:
Healthcare Assistant role supporting clinical teams.

- Monitor patient wellbeing
- Assist nurses with care delivery
- Maintain hygiene standards

Benefits:
- NHS experience
- Flexible work patterns

title: Support Worker - Nights
description:
Night Support Worker role providing overnight care.

- Support residents during night shifts
- Monitor safety and wellbeing
- Respond to needs promptly

Benefits:
- Night shift enhancements
- Training provided

title: Residential Support Worker
description:
Residential Support Worker role supporting vulnerable individuals.

- Provide emotional and practical support
- Work within care plans
- Maintain safeguarding standards

Benefits:
- Competitive hourly rate
- Ongoing support

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker role helping people live independently.

- Encourage independence
- Assist with daily routines
- Support community engagement

Benefits:
- Inclusive workplace
- Development opportunities

title: Care Assistant
description:
Care Assistant role delivering high-quality home care.

- Provide personal care
- Support medication routines
- Build relationships with clients

Benefits:
- Mileage paid
- Flexible working
